zh.Hooley House,Coulsdon,Surrey,England: 英國英格蘭素瑞胡利 豪斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Atte Wode於1245年出生在英國素瑞胡利 豪斯時，他的父親William Wyckhurst Atte Wode22歲，母親Julia De Avenell15歲。他於1270年與Alice de Tichesey在英國英格蘭素瑞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1279年住在英國英格蘭素瑞。他去世於1313年在英國英格蘭素瑞胡利 豪斯享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞庫爾達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Atte Wode于1245年出生在英国素瑞胡利 豪斯时，他的父亲William Wyckhurst Atte Wode22岁，母亲Julia De Avenell15岁。他于1270年与Alice de Tichesey在英国英格兰素瑞结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1279年住在英国英格兰素瑞。他去世于1313年在英国英格兰素瑞胡利 豪斯享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞庫爾達。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Atte

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Atte Wode was born in 1245, in Hooley House, Surrey, England, his father, William Wyckhurst Atte Wode, was 22 and his mother, Julia De Avenell, was 15. He married Alice de Tichesey in 1270, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He lived in Surrey, England, United Kingdom in 1279. He died in 1313, in Hooley House, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Coulsdon, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Atte Wode est né en 1245, à Hooley House, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, William Wyckhurst Atte Wode, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Julia De Avenell, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Tichesey en 1270, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1279. Il est décédé en 1313, à Hooley House, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Coulsdon, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Atte Wode 1245 in Hooley House, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Wyckhurst Atte Wode 22 und seine Mutter Julia De Avenell 15. Er hat 1270 in Surrey, England, United Kingdom Alice de Tichesey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1279 hat er in Surrey, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb 1313 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Hooley House, Surrey, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Coulsdon, Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Atte Wode è nato il nel 1245 nel Hooley House, Surrey, England, il suo padre, William Wyckhurst Atte Wode, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Julia De Avenell, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Tichesey nel 1270, nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1279. Morì nel 1313, nel Hooley House, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Coulsdon, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Atte Wodeが1245年にイギリススリーホーオリー ホーウゼで生まれた時，父William Wyckhurst Atte Wodeは22歳，母Julia De Avenellは15歳であった。1270年にイギリスイギリススリーでAlice de Ticheseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1279年にはイギリスイギリススリーに住んでいた。彼は1313年にイギリスイギリススリーホーオリー ホーウゼで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーコウルスドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Atte Wode(이)가 1245년 영국 수리 후리 허스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wyckhurst Atte Wode(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Julia De Avenell(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 Alice de Tichesey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1279년도에 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 살았다. 그는 1313년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 후리 허스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 콜즈던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Atte Wode nasceu em 1245, em Hooley House, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Wyckhurst Atte Wode, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Julia De Avenell, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Tichesey em 1270, em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1279. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Atte Wode родился в 1245 г. в местности хули хоус, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени William Wyckhurst Atte Wode было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Julia De Avenell, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Tichesey в 1270 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания в 1279 году. Он умер в 1313 г. в местности хули хоус, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности коулсдон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Alice de Tichesey en 1270, en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Vivió en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1279.
